productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Solid Grey Blazer Jacket
description: Composition Grey denim blazer jacket made of 100% cotton, has full sleeves with decorative buttoned cuffs, a peaked lapel, buttoned front , mock pocket on the left chest, two patch pockets on either sides of the waist, contrast stitch detailing and a slit at the back hem Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash with cold water Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach, iron or wring Dry in shade This blazer jacket from united colors of benetton is the perfect piece for winter versatility. It's a unique mix of a formal blazer with casual denim &ndash crossing that tricky line between smart and relaxed. Pair it with jeans and suede shoes, or wear unbuttoned with a monochrome shirt and chinos. Ankle high boots look best with this piece. Model statistics The product is a a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18&rdquo
